tasks.instruction: Add two limited edition vinyl albums by different artists priced at $30 or less each so their combined total is under $60, then select the cheapest available shipping option at checkout.

tasks.instruction: Pre-order the highest-rated cassette album scheduled for release within the next 3 months that costs under $20, and choose the pay-on-release payment option at checkout.

tasks.instruction: From a single artist’s merch, add one black T-shirt in size M priced at $30 or less and one black hoodie in size L priced at $50 or less so their combined total does not exceed $80.

tasks.instruction: Create a new user account, then add three albums rated at least 4.5 stars to your wishlist, including at least one Indie Rock album and at least one Electronic album.

tasks.instruction: Add three Electronic tracks with tempo over 120 BPM priced under $2 each to your cart, making sure they are by three different artists.
